exploration_notes: Comprehensive exploration of the Grafana v11.4.0 codebase covering 6 areas: (1) Main entry at pkg/cmd/grafana/main.go using urfave/cli/v2, bootstrapped via Google Wire DI in pkg/server/wire.go; (2) Core backend packages including API routing (pkg/api/routing/), DI (pkg/server/), datasource proxy (pkg/services/datasourceproxy/), alerting (pkg/services/ngalert/), and auth (pkg/services/authn/); (3) Plugin architecture with core plugins in pkg/tsdb/, external plugins via HashiCorp go-plugin/gRPC in
